sparkrulespanel.sparkrulespanel.rulestex: Breaking any of these rules will result in a temporary or permanent ban from the app.
sparkrulespanel.sparkrulespanel.staysafe: Don't share or request things with people you don't know. That includes your real name, phone number, home address, email address, social networking information, school name, username, personal blog, photographs, and videos.
sparkrulespanel.sparkrulespanel.respecto: Always be respectful and kind towards other Disney Mix Guests. We do not tolerate bullying or harassing behavior.
sparkrulespanel.sparkrulespanel.cleandet: Only share appropriate language, photos and videos. We do not tolerate swearing, racism, illegal, foul or graphic content of any kind.

passwordrulesdetailtext.passwordrulespan:
• Contain 6-64 characters
• Be a mix of letters and numbers, or special characters ($%&#!_)
• May not include profile data (e.g., date of birth, phone #)
privacypracticesdetailtext.privacypracti: The Walt Disney Company (Australia) Pty Limited collects personal information such as your name, birth date and email address so we can provide you with access to My Disney and other Disney sites, and personalise the content and experience of those sites. We may disclose it to our service providers and other members of The Walt Disney Group (including overseas) in a manner consistent with the Australian Privacy Principles.  For more information, including how to contact us, please read our Privacy Policy.  Please note that you do not have to provide your real name when registering.

customtokens.fakefriend.message_1: Hey there, I'm Mixbot, the best thing to happen to chat since emoji. Ready to mix it up?
customtokens.fakefriend.message_2: [Y: Affirmative! Sweet, let's do this.] [N: Wasn't prepared for that answer. Sad face.]
customtokens.fakefriend.message_4: That's a sticker, and this app is full of them. Choose one.
customtokens.fakefriend.message_5: Epic choice! And I'm not just saying that because I'm programmed to.
customtokens.fakefriend.message_7: Don't move. Wait for it…wait for it…
customtokens.fakefriend.message_9: You know what's better than sending game challenges to friends? Nothing. NOTHING IS BETTER!
customtokens.fakefriend.message_10: Take a picture, it'll last longer! Haha! No seriously, take a picture.
customtokens.fakefriend.message_11: You're the smartest person I've ever met. Seriously. Ready to mix it up with your friends?
customtokens.fakefriend.message_12: [Y: YES! Let's do this thing.] [N: Huh, that's kinda sad. But okay.]
customtokens.fakefriend.message_14: Choose a sticker, any sticker, and tell me how you really feel.
customtokens.fakefriend.message_15: Gags are great for when you're lazy and don't feel like typing stuff.
customtokens.fakefriend.message_16: I accept the game challenge you are going to send me! Go on, send it!
customtokens.fakefriend.message_17: Now send me a picture of a magical unicorn. Or something else.
customtokens.game.moderated_text: Try again - and this time, choose different words!
customtokens.secretword.invalid_hint: Try again - and this time, choose a different hint!
customtokens.secretword.create_word: Create a word for {0} to guess
customtokens.secretword.create_word_grou: Create a word for your friends to guess
no_longer_friends.chat.no_longer_friends: You are no longer friends with this person
meme_generator.content.errortext: Try again - and this time, choose different words!
customtokens.chat.no_longer_friends: You are no longer friends with this person
qrcodepanel.notificationbar.notification: Incoming Friend Request - Tap To View
customtokens.fakefriend.message_20: Talking to yourself gets old. And maybe weird? Tell your real, human friends to join you in Disney Mix!
customtokens.fakefriend.message_21: A little robot birdie told me your Friends List is empty. Invite your real friends and family to Disney Mix and fill 'er up!
customtokens.fakefriend.message_22: Disney Mix is 99.9% more fun with your real friends and family. True fact.
customtokens.fakefriend.message_23: Robots are fun.Your friends are funner. Ask them to join you in Disney Mix!
customtokens.fakefriend.message_24: Hello? Where is everyone? Oh there you are, but where are your friends?
customtokens.fakefriend.message_25: Where are your friends at? I mean your real-life, human friends. Invite them to Disney Mix!
reportplayerpanel.reasontextcontainer.re: For #reasonType#. Are you sure you want to do this?
customtokens.fakefriend.message_50: Just keep swimming. Said no robot ever.
customtokens.fakefriend.message_51: The cold never bothered me anyway. I've got a built-in space heater.
customtokens.fakefriend.message_52: I like warm hugs. And I'm metal, so I won't melt like a snowman.
customtokens.fakefriend.message_53: I don't have a skull… or bones. It's all circuits, baby.
customtokens.fakefriend.message_54: Adventure is out there. There's an app for it.
customtokens.fakefriend.message_55: I shall call him Squishy. Hey, I don't make fun of YOUR friends.
customtokens.fakefriend.message_56: I do not like the cone of shame. It doesn't fit on my square head.
customtokens.fakefriend.message_57: To infinity… and beyond! I've been there, it's cool.
customtokens.fakefriend.message_58: Not everyone can be a great artist, that's why there are stickers.
customtokens.fakefriend.message_59: Thanks for the adventure. Now go have a new one. And take pictures!
customtokens.fakefriend.message_60: Oh, Hi! Umm, I was just taking a little…robot…nap….zzzzzz
customtokens.fakefriend.message_61: Our fate lies within us. And gas, that lies within us too.
customtokens.fakefriend.message_71: I don't have a skull… or bones. It's all circuits, baby.

By creating an account, I agree to the Terms of Use below.

The Walt Disney Company (Australia) Pty Limited collects personal information such as name, birth date and email address so we can provide you with access to My Disney and other Disney sites, and personalize the content and experience of those sites. We may disclose it to our service providers and other members of The Walt Disney Group (including overseas) in a manner consistent with the Australian Privacy Principles. For more information, including how to contact us, please read our Privacy Policy below. Please note that you do not have to provide your real name when registering.
